_note: Daemon provider universe snapshot. Generated from health.py:802 universe = _MODEL_OAUTH_PROVIDERS | set(byok_provider_registry.list_wired_providers()) | {'claude','openai','gemini'}. Refresh cadence: quarterly and before each major launch. Bidirectional live drift detection (daemon-side fixture freshness check) in tests/test_byok_openclaw_parity.py.

no_egress_carveouts.litellm: self-hosted aggregator — routes locally, no proxy egress
no_egress_carveouts.lmstudio: local desktop LLM runner — no proxy egress
no_egress_carveouts.ollama: local Ollama server — no proxy egress (localhost confinement)

proxy_key_aliases._note: Daemon key → proxy roster key; all keys not listed here use identical names in both repos

cert_pin_citation.note: Cert-pin enforcement is daemon-side only. The proxy (Cloudflare Worker) cannot pin Python TLS chains. is_strict_mode() → CertPinningError + socket close. One pinned host, process-global no-bypass invariant, covered by daemon test suite. NOT duplicated in the proxy per §C-BRIDGE brief §5.
